name: Maple Baked Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge chicken pieces in flour seasoned with salt and pepper to taste.
2. In a heavy, flameproof casserole, heat butter until bubbling.
3. Brown chicken pieces in the butter.
4. Pour maple syrup over chicken.
5. Sprinkle savory, thyme, and sage on top of chicken.
6. Arrange onion slices on top of chicken pieces.
7. Pour water into the bottom of the casserole.
8. Bake, uncovered, in a 350°F oven for 50 to 60 minutes or until tender, basting occasionally with pan juices.
